name: project-intelligence
description: Project-level intelligence for standards, knowledge, graph context, quality checks, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Project standards, knowledge, graph context, and review checks.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence initializes and refreshes a repository-local .project-intel knowledge base for project standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, quality checks, and code review workflows. It intentionally does not integrate with cgraphx.
defaultPrompt: Review this change with project intelligence.
Find reusable components and APIs for this task.
